Choose your destination - then lather, rinse, retreat.

settings.title: Mark your calendars.
settings.content: Let's celebrate our new release, and get an exceptional 20% discount on your order. The perfect gift for you or your best friend.

settings.card_1_quote: I've noticed such a difference in my hair thickness and volume!
settings.card_2_quote: My scalp feels so much healthier and my hair looks amazing!
settings.card_3_quote: I'm shedding so much less hair now. This really works!
settings.card_4_quote: The volume is incredible! My hair has never looked better.

settings.author: Francoise T.
settings.title: My skin has never felt this smooth—lightweight, effective, and a new staple in my routine.

settings.author: Elodie M.
settings.title: I noticed a visible glow after just a few days. It feels like self-care in a bottle.

settings.author: Magali L.
settings.title: Gentle on my sensitive skin but powerful results. I’m obsessed!

settings.author: Marie U.
settings.title: This product actually does what it promises. Hydrated, radiant skin all day.
Pure beauty.
settings.content: Certified by Ecocert and bearing the Cosmos Organic and Cosmos Natural labels, our products meet the highest standards of ingredient quality. Packaged in recycled glass, they also reflect a strong commitment to environmental responsibility.

settings.author: Le monde
settings.content: Brazilian beauty is having a huge moment, and I’m obsessed with this Rio-inspired scent from Shampoo Hotel. It lathers up SO well on my body and hydrates my sensitive skin with ease. When I step out of the shower after using this, I smell like I’ve just come back from a sweet beach vacation.

settings.author: Marie-Claire
settings.content: When you can’t make it to Marrakesh, you can check into the Shampoohotel anytime to escape with your skincare. Turn your bathroom into a hotel with this new brand that has four collections around iconic destinations: Miami, Marrakesh, Rio and Paris.

settings.author: Elle
settings.content: Perfect if you’re dealing with damage or want a routine that doubles as sensory escape.

settings.author: Elle
settings.content: Inspired by the beachside vibe of its namesake city, this leave-in conditioner is your shortcut to soft, hydrated, and effortlessly smooth hair. Infused with nourishing hyaluronic acid, the formula detangles and replenishes moisture to leave hair with a silky feel. This leave-in reduces frizz by up to 85%* in high humidity and is formulated for all hair types.

settings.author: Elle
settings.content: Bringing the charm of hotel amenities into the home, Shampoohotel offers a beauty range that combines sensorial fragrance, salon-quality formulas, and accessible pricing to elevate everyday routines.

settings.author: Elle
settings.content: Because that shower after a pool or beach day just hits different, especially on vacation. The decadent body products from this new travel-inspired hair and body brand are developed by in-house perfumers with scents inspired by iconic destinations: Paris (crisp and sophisticated), Miami (uplifting and bright), Marrakesh (sultry and striking), and Rio (warm and intoxicating).

settings.author: Elle
settings.content: The shampoo was luxuriously creamy and left my hair feeling clean but not stripped . . . the conditioner hydrated my waves really well without weighing them down. The fragrance of all of these products is heavenly, too; it’s this sunscreeny, summery, salty smell that I couldn’t stop opening the bottles to take a whiff of!”

settings.text: Our mission extends beyond skincare—we’re dedicated to making a meaningful difference for the planet and its people. Every purchase on our Eshop helps us grow this impact. Since 2018, we’ve planted 200,000 trees worldwide—nurturing ecosystems and supporting reforestation, one order at a time.
